name: Madolche Promenade
name_jp: マドルチェ・プロムナード
desc: Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls and 1 "Madolche" monster you control or in your GY; negate the effects of that opponent's card until the end of this turn, and if you do, return your monster to the hand. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Madolche" Xyz Monster you control; attach 1 "Madolche" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY, to it as material. You can only use 1 "Madolche Promenade" effect per turn, and only once that turn.
eff: Target 1 face-up card your opponent controls and 1 "Madolche" monster you control or in your GY; negate the effects of that opponent's card until the end of this turn, and if you do, return your monster to the hand. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 "Madolche" Xyz Monster you control; attach 1 "Madolche" monster from your hand, Deck, or GY, to it as material. You can only use 1 "Madolche Promenade" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

action: Returns from your field to your hand
Attaches from your hand as Xyz Material
Attaches from your Deck as Xyz Material
Attaches from your Graveyard as Xyz Material
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the effects of your opponent's Trap Cards
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
